---
name: "\U0001F41B Bug Report"
about: Report a broken feature, UI glitch, or system failure.
title: "[BUG] - Brief description"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🎟️ Ticket Scope & Complexity
**`[Ticket ID / Bug] | [Complexity L1-L5] | [Zero-Cost & Modular: Y/N] | [Current Revert Hash]`**

* **L1 - Trivial:** CSS glitch, typo.
* **L2 - Isolated Logic:** Single function throwing an error.
* **L3 - Integration:** API endpoint failing.
* **L4 - Security/Architecture:** Authentication bypass, database lock.
* **L5 - Danger Zone:** Complete service outage.

## 💥 The Breakage
**What is happening?**
> (Describe the bug. Include error logs or stack traces if available.)

**What should be happening?**
> (Describe the expected, self-healing, or correct behavior.)

## 🛑 The Hard-Stop Check
- [ ] Will fixing this require modifying more than 2 files simultaneously? 
*(If yes, STOP. Request Lead Architect approval before proceeding to prevent cascading errors.)*

## 🎨 UI/UX Component Isolation (If Frontend)
*(If this is a UI bug, isolate the component. E.g., 'The Login Button hover state is broken.')*
> 

---
### 💡 Future Horizon Log
*(Did you spot technical debt while logging this? Drop it here, don't bloat the bug fix.)*
